fields.description:
This is an umbrella JIRA for the alpha 2 milestone for YARN Timeline Service v.2.

This is developed on feature branches: {{YARN-5355}} for the trunk-based development and {{YARN-5355-branch-2}} to maintain backports to branch-2. Any subtask work on this JIRA will be committed to those 2 branches.

comments.body: I have just created and pushed branches {{YARN-5355}} and {{YARN-5355-branch-2}}. They are now open for this feature development.
Uploading the patch for back-porting to branch-2.  (YARN-5355-branch-2.01.patch)
Thanks [~vrushalic] for creating the branch-2 patch! Vrushali and I tested it, and it looks good. I'll commit it into our branch-2 feature branch ( {{YARN-5355-branch-2}} ) shortly.
It has been committed to {{YARN-5355-branch-2}}. Thanks Vrushali for the backport!

Hey folks,

Seems like this is headed toward a merge soon. Great work!

Does someone mind adding a release note to this JIRA for our end users, describing the major improvements since alpha 1?

Also we should update the release notes at hadoop-project/src/site/markdown/index.md.vm. The [alpha4 release notes|http://hadoop.apache.org/docs/r3.0.0-alpha4/] say "an early preview (alpha 1)", so we should at least update this to say alpha 2.

Thanks [~andrew.wang] 

We will make sure to update the release notes to this jira in the next few days.

I have noted down in our documentation jira YARN-6047 regarding the release note changes in hadoop-project/src/site/markdown/index.md.

Test failures and timeouts are outstanding issues on trunk.
Some of these issues can be seen in daily build as well. Refer to https://builds.apache.org/job/hadoop-qbt-trunk-java8-linux-ppc/376/console

Failures are tracked by following JIRAs' on trunk.
# TestContainerAllocation failure is tracked by YARN-7044
# TestSubmitApplicationWithRMHA, TestAMRMClient and TestContainerManagerSecurity by YARN-7080, YARN-7081 and YARN-7082. These failures exist in daily build report.
# TestFSAppStarvation by YARN-6747. 

All checkstyle issues barring one relate to patameter number and cannot be fixed. One pending checkstyle issue will be fixed before merge.

The merge vote concluded as noted at 
http://www.mail-archive.com/yarn-dev@hadoop.apache.org/msg27610.html

and accordingly Timeline Service v2 has been merged to trunk as part of 
https://github.com/apache/hadoop/commit/32cba6c3036dfb1dcb0a4fd77a68ddad17dd4082

Three cheers for [~rohithsharma], [~varun_saxena], [~sjlee0], [~haibo.chen], [~jrottinghuis], [~gtCarrera9] and [~vrushalic] for contributing to this milestone!   

Special thanks to folks who guided us with their insights, reviews and discussions:
[~jianhe], [~vinodkv], [~jlowe], [~rkanter], [~junping_du], [~stack], [~enis], [~subru], [~curino], [~ctrezzo], [~lohit] and to [~andrew.wang] for including it as part of 3.0.0-beta1.

For further updates on progress on Timeline Service v2, please follow YARN-7055

Thrilled to report that Timeline Service v2 has also been back-ported to branch-2 and committed by [~varun_saxena] as part of

https://github.com/apache/hadoop/commit/54a694172d7162b2ff45d6e1780c0523cfda66e7

Also, emailed all dev lists at
https://mail-archives.apache.org/mod_mbox/hadoop-common-dev/201710.mbox/%3CCANyB6pvWG8fU0v_VPnJerGCw8Ot_QZtXUGS0oaT6CYAUsMNByQ@mail.gmail.com%3E

comments.body: I have just created and pushed branches {{YARN-5355}} and {{YARN-5355-branch-2}}. They are now open for this feature development.
Uploading the patch for back-porting to branch-2.  (YARN-5355-branch-2.01.patch)
Thanks [~vrushalic] for creating the branch-2 patch! Vrushali and I tested it, and it looks good. I'll commit it into our branch-2 feature branch ( {{YARN-5355-branch-2}} ) shortly.
It has been committed to {{YARN-5355-branch-2}}. Thanks Vrushali for the backport!

Hey folks,

Seems like this is headed toward a merge soon. Great work!

Does someone mind adding a release note to this JIRA for our end users, describing the major improvements since alpha 1?

Also we should update the release notes at hadoop-project/src/site/markdown/index.md.vm. The [alpha4 release notes|http://hadoop.apache.org/docs/r3.0.0-alpha4/] say "an early preview (alpha 1)", so we should at least update this to say alpha 2.

Thanks [~andrew.wang] 

We will make sure to update the release notes to this jira in the next few days.

I have noted down in our documentation jira YARN-6047 regarding the release note changes in hadoop-project/src/site/markdown/index.md.
